name: Deep Dish Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Juice over peach slices in a large bowl.
2. Mix 1 1/4 cups sugar with the salt, nutmeg, cinnamon, and flour.
3. Add to peaches. Toss until evenly coated.
4. Spread in a 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Roll out pastry and cover dish with 1 1/2 inch overhang.
7. Press pastry to edge of dish and flute the edge.
8. Cut 3 vents in top.
9. Sprinkle with remaining sugar.
10. Bake for 10 minutes at 450 degrees, then reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake for 30 more minutes.
11. Serve with whipped cream.
Makes 1 pie
Preheat oven to 450 degrees
Prep time: 1 hour
